/**
 * src/components/ui/Toast.js
 * ─────────────────────────────────────────────
 * Global toast notification component.
 * Renders the current toast from global state (if any).
 *
 * Triggered from anywhere via the useToast() hook:
 *   const showToast = useToast();
 *   showToast('Device registered!', 'Now protected in the registry.', 'success');
 *
 * Types: 'success' | 'error' | 'warn' | 'info'

if(!toast)return null;return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:`toast ${toast.type==='success'?'':toast.type}`,role:"alert",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"toast-icon",children:ICONS[toast.type]||'💬'}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"toast-msg",children:toast.message}),toast.subMessage&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"toast-sub",children:toast.subMessage})]})]});}
